title: Why Broke People Look Rich

scenes.text: The person flexing the new car is often the one closest to broke.
scenes.hook_top: LOOKING RICH IS NOT BEING RICH

scenes.text: Real wealth is quiet. It's the assets you don't see, not the logos you do.
Spending to look rich is the fastest way to never become rich. Every status buy is money that could have worked for you.
Buy assets in private. Let your money grow where no one is watching.
scenes.label: STAY QUIET, GET RICH

scenes.text: Follow and your future rich self will thank you.

description: Looking rich and being rich are opposites. Real wealth is quiet - the assets you don't see, not the logos you do. Follow for daily money wisdom!
